title: Backported Piggies
description: Backports the new pig variants into past versions through a simple resource pack!
body:
# Backported Piggies
A simple but effective resource pack which backports the new warm and cold pig variants to previous versions of the game! Each pig variant now spawns in their respective biome, including support for outdated biome IDs in older versions.

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or both [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) installed to work.


## Download Links
Optifine: https://optifine.net/home

Entity Model Features: https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

Entity Texture Features https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

**All assets within this resource pack are owned by Mojang and do not belong to me**

## Also check out:

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/backportedchickens](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/backportedchickens)
